summary: This week in AI, significant advancements were made in various sectors, including graphics and simulation, with NVIDIA's Agentic and Physical AI. OpenAI shared lessons from deploying long-running AI models, highlighting new safety risks and improved safeguards. Meanwhile, Apple's lawsuit against OpenAI could disrupt the latter's IPO plans.
insight: The increasing presence of AI in multiple industries underscores the need for a balanced approach to innovation and regulation, ensuring that technological advancements serve the greater good without compromising safety and ethics.
highlights: NVIDIA advances graphics and simulation with Agentic and Physical AI, transforming media and content creation.
OpenAI shares critical lessons from deploying long-horizon models, emphasizing safety and alignment in AI development.
Apple's lawsuit against OpenAI could have significant implications for the future of AI development and deployment.

articles.title: At SIGGRAPH, NVIDIA Advances Graphics and Simulation With Agentic and Physical AI
articles.description: From open models to real-time simulation, AI and graphics breakthroughs are transforming media, content creation and robotics.

articles.title: Safety and alignment in an era of long-horizon models
articles.description: OpenAI shares lessons from deploying long-running AI models, highlighting new safety risks, observed failures, and improved safeguards through iterative deployment.

articles.title: China delivers a one-two punch to America’s AI dominance
articles.description: China's leading AI companies are ramping up the pressure on Silicon Valley, as Moonshot and Alibaba unveiled models they claim can go toe-to-toe with the best from OpenAI and Anthr

articles.title: Can an Apple lawsuit derail OpenAI’s hardware plans?
articles.description: On the latest episode of Equity, we debate whether Apple's lawsuit will cast a shadow over OpenAi's much-discussed plans to get into hardware and go public.

articles.title: How Apple’s big lawsuit could disrupt OpenAI’s IPO plans
articles.description: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI last Friday, and it’s not messing around. The complaint alleges a pattern of misconduct reaching all the way up to OpenAI’s chief

articles.title: YouTube clarifies policies around AI slop and upsetting videos
articles.description: YouTube has updated its monetization policies to more clearly define the kinds of AI-generated and low-quality videos that can’t earn ad revenue.

articles.title: Bristol Myers Squibb Building Life Science Industry’s Most Advanced AI Factory on NVIDIA Vera Rubin

articles.title: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
articles.description: Databricks has remade its image into an AI company and has published research on the cost savings of open-weight AI models for coding.

articles.title: Agility Robotics plants its flag in Tesla’s backyard
articles.description: Agility is opening a new training center for its Digit robots in Fremont, California.

articles.title: Fear of humanoid robots spurs human workers to strike at Hyundai auto factory
articles.description: Hyundai aims to deploy 25,000 Atlas robots starting with US factories in 2028.
